title: coridothymus capitatus
intro: Coridothymus capitatus, also known as Greek mountain tea or capitis, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Greece. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains thymol, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coridothymus capitatus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and possessing antioxidant properties to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Coridothymus capitatus include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
